items.title: Racing corgi dogs show off speed and style in Lithuania contest | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Hundreds of corgi dogs and their owners gathered in Vilnius for the annual corgi race, celebrating the beloved breed with competitions and a costume fashion show.

"It's cherishing the breed of the corgis and it's just celebrating life in general," said race organizer Edvinas Miskas.

#corgi #dog #race #lithuania #pets #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: World's first gene edited horses are shaking up polo | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Five gene-edited foals, cloned from a polo prize winner, promise greater speed thanks to CRISPR technology. While Kheiron Biotech sees a revolution in polo, breeders and players say gene-editing could threaten the sport’s integrity. 
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #polo #argentina #sports #horse #bioscience #cloning

items.title: Trump tariffs, Abbas, Meta chatbots, UK migration and Tony Hawk
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A U.S. court rules most Trump-era tariffs illegal but leaves them in place for now. The U.S. blocks Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas from attending the UN General Assembly. Meta has appropriated the names and likenesses of celebrities to create dozens of flirty social-media chatbots without their permission. A UK asylum hotel ruling comes amid anti-migration unrest and as national flags appear across British streets. And Tony Hawk’s legendary skateboard heads to auction - with a price tag that could hit $700,000. 



Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter here (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) .

items.title: No ruling yet on Trump's firing of Fed Governor Cook | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A court hearing on President Trump's attempt to fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook ended with no immediate ruling from the judge hearing the unprecedented legal fight, meaning the US central bank policymaker will remain in place for now.
#News #trump #federalreserve #lisacook #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: ✍️ ’The Brothers Size' playwright says story of rebuilding life still resonates
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Tarell Alvin McCraney's play "The Brothers Size" will mark its 20th anniversary with a new production at The Shed in New York City. "It's one of those moments where you sort of run into this play and it just reminds you fiercely that it's so relevant," McCraney said.
